channels.name: Barely Sociable
channels.notes: 1.38M subscribers. Dark web + true crime crossover. Investigative journalist tone. Top performer: The Dark Side of the Silk Road (13.1M views).

channels.name: Unnamed TV
channels.notes: Cinematic, narrative-driven, tight pacing. Short-to-medium form (8-20 min). Top video: Mexico's Most Disturbing Cult (2.2M views).

channels.name: Fredrik Knudsen
channels.notes: 1.26M subscribers, 39 videos, 111.4M total views. Clinically neutral, deadpan deep dives into weird internet history and obscure real-world events. 20-60 min.
